Text: I recommend Andrius for his diligence and eagerness to master data science. In my role as a peer mentor at Turing College, I’ve observed him consistently attend consultations and ask questions that cut to the core of each topic. His curiosity and pragmatic focus set him apart, and he maintains a positive attitude that fosters open collaboration. He cares about his work, which makes him a good option for a data science role.

Working with Andrius at UAB “Devoro” has been a transformative experience. Their deep knowledge of full-stack development and practical guidance have been crucial to my growth. They have a remarkable talent for making complex concepts accessible and providing actionable insights.
